name: Random Follow-up
description: Creates a random follow-up date within a set interval

project-settings.name: Enable Random Follow-up
project-settings.description: Enable random follow-up date generation for this project

project-settings.name: Follow-up Date Field
project-settings.description: Select the field that will store the random follow-up date

project-settings.name: Start Date Field
project-settings.description: Select the field that contains the start date for calculation (e.g., enrollment date)

project-settings.name: Event Date Field (Optional)
project-settings.description: Optional field for event date (e.g., fracture date). If provided and not empty, this will be used instead of the start date field

project-settings.name: Minimum Days
project-settings.description: Minimum number of days after trigger date

project-settings.name: Maximum Days
project-settings.description: Maximum number of days after trigger date
